nonBlockingIssues.description: Rollback remediation currently clears all chaos faults on the target service, which may over-clear same-service stacked non-bad_config faults.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify strict integer validation guidance to include `field_validator(mode='before')` as an acceptable pattern when `StrictInt` is incompatible with inherited OpenEnv model behavior.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Fix feature successfully used a before-validator in models.py to reject float/bool coercion for action_type while preserving model compatibility.
